
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Banbury Cross Educational Academy – Premier Preschool in Lucknow</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,600;0,700;1,600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
:root{
  --teal:#0891b2;--teal-d:#0e7490;--teal-l:#ecfeff;--teal-mid:#cffafe;
  --navy:#0f2044;--navy-l:#1e3a6e;
  --red:#dc2626;--red-l:#fee2e2;
  --amber:#d97706;--amber-l:#fef3c7;
  --sage:#16a34a;--sage-l:#dcfce7;
  --white:#ffffff;--off:#f8fafc;--border:#e2e8f0;
  --text:#1e293b;--muted:#64748b;--light:#94a3b8;
  --shadow-sm:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.08),0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
  --shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  --shadow-lg:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
  --r:12px;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--text);background:var(--white);overflow-x:hidden;line-height:1.6;}
img{display:block;}

/* TOPBAR */
.topbar{background:var(--navy);padding:9px 24px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;}
.topbar-left{display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.topbar span,.topbar a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);font-size:.78rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;}
.topbar a:hover{color:var(--teal-mid);}
.topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.topbar-wa{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:rgba(255,255,255,.85)!important;padding:4px 14px;border-radius:20px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;transition:all .2s!important;}
.topbar-wa:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.18)!important;}

/* NAV */
nav{background:var(--white);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:999;}
.nav-inner{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:14px 24px;}
.nav-logo img{height:56px;object-fit:contain;}
.nav-links{display:flex;list-style:none;gap:0;align-items:center;}
.nav-links a{font-size:.87rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px;transition:color .2s,background .2s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--teal);background:var(--teal-l);}
.nav-apply{background:var(--teal)!important;color:var(--white)!important;font-weight:700!important;padding:10px 22px!important;border-radius:50px!important;margin-left:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(8,145,178,.25);}
.nav-apply:hover{background:var(--teal-d)!important;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(8,145,178,.35)!important;}

/* HERO */
.hero{background:linear-gradient(150deg,#f0f9ff 0%,#e0f2fe 40%,#f0fdf4 100%);padding:80px 24px 72px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-80px;right:-80px;width:360px;height:360px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(8,145,178,.08),transparent 70%);}
.hero-wrap{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr;gap:72px;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.hero-eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--teal-d);background:var(--teal-l);border:1px solid var(--teal-mid);padding:7px 16px;border-radius:50px;margin-bottom:22px;}
.hero-eyebrow::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--teal);border-radius:50%;animation:blink 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.3;}}
.hero h1{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2.6rem,5vw,4rem);line-height:1.12;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:20px;font-weight:700;}
.hero h1 i{font-style:italic;color:var(--teal);}
.hero-desc{font-size:1.02rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:500px;}
.hero-ctas{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:44px;}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:13px 28px;border-radius:50px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:.93rem;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.btn-teal{background:var(--teal);color:var(--white);box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(8,145,178,.3);}
.btn-teal:hover{background:var(--teal-d);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(8,145,178,.38);}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--navy);border:1.5px solid var(--border);}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--teal);color:var(--teal);background:var(--teal-l);}
.hero-trust{display:flex;gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;}
.trust-item strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:700;}
.hero-visual{display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto auto;gap:16px;}
.hero-main-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:36px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);border:1px solid var(--border);text-align:center;position:relative;}
.hero-main-card::before{content:'Estd. 1990';position:absolute;top:-13px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--amber);color:var(--white);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;padding:5px 16px;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;letter-spacing:.5px;}
.hero-main-icon{font-size:4.5rem;display:block;margin-bottom:14px;}
.hero-main-card h3{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700;}
.hero-main-card p{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
.hero-sub-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;}
.hero-sub-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:16px;padding:18px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;transition:box-shadow .2s;}
.hero-sub-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.hsc-icon{font-size:1.6rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.hsc-text strong{display:block;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);}
.hsc-text span{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);}

/* STATS STRIP */
.stats-strip{background:var(--navy);padding:32px 24px;}
.stats-inner{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:24px;}
.stat{text-align:center;padding:4px;}
.stat-n{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:2.6rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);display:block;line-height:1;}
.stat-l{font-size:.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-weight:500;margin-top:6px;display:block;letter-spacing:.3px;}
.stat-div{width:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}

/* SECTIONS */
.sec{padding:88px 24px;}
.sec-inner{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;}
.eyebrow{display:inline-block;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:20px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.ey-teal{background:var(--teal-l);color:var(--teal-d);}
.ey-red{background:var(--red-l);color:var(--red);}
.ey-amber{background:var(--amber-l);color:var(--amber);}
.ey-sage{background:var(--sage-l);color:var(--sage);}
.sec-h{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,2.8rem);color:var(--navy);line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:14px;font-weight:700;}
.sec-p{font-size:.97rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;max-width:580px;margin-bottom:52px;}
.two-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:72px;align-items:center;}
.three-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:28px;}
.four-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:24px;}
.auto-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:24px;}

/* WHY EARLY ED */
#why-early{background:var(--off);}
.early-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--r);padding:28px 24px;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .25s;}
.early-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow);border-color:var(--teal-mid);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.ec-icon{font-size:2.2rem;display:block;margin-bottom:14px;}
.early-card h3{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;}
.early-card p{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;}
.research-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy),var(--navy-l));border-radius:20px;padding:40px 44px;margin-top:48px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:40px;align-items:center;}
.rb-text h3{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:12px;font-weight:700;}
.rb-text p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.75;}
.rb-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;}
.rb-stat{background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;text-align:center;}
.rb-stat-n{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal-mid);display:block;}
.rb-stat-l{font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin-top:4px;display:block;line-height:1.4;}

/* ABOUT */
#about{background:var(--white);}
.about-img{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--teal-l),#bae6fd);border-radius:24px;padding:52px 40px;text-align:center;position:relative;}
.about-img-icon{font-size:5.5rem;display:block;margin-bottom:16px;}
.about-img h3{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;}
.about-img p{font-size:.87rem;color:var(--muted);}
.since-pill{position:absolute;top:-13px;right:24px;background:var(--amber);color:var(--white);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(217,119,6,.3);}
.about-list{list-style:none;margin:24px 0 32px;}
.about-list li{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:.92rem;color:var(--text);line-height:1.6;}
.al-dot{flex-shrink:0;width:20px;height:20px;background:var(--teal);color:var(--white);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:800;margin-top:2px;}
.mini-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:14px;}
.ms{background:var(--off);border-radius:var(--r);padding:18px 14px;text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.ms-n{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal);display:block;}
.ms-l{font-size:.73rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;}

/* WHY CHOOSE US */
#why-us{background:var(--off);}
.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}
.why-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--r);padding:32px 26px;border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all .25s;}
.why-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;}
.why-card:nth-child(1)::after{background:var(--teal);}
.why-card:nth-child(2)::after{background:var(--amber);}
.why-card:nth-child(3)::after{background:var(--red);}
.why-card:nth-child(4)::after{background:var(--sage);}
.why-card:nth-child(5)::after{background:var(--navy);}
.why-card:nth-child(6)::after{background:#7c3aed;}
.why-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:transparent;}
.wc-num{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:3.5rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--border);line-height:1;position:absolute;top:16px;right:20px;}
.wc-icon{font-size:2rem;display:block;margin-bottom:14px;}
.why-card h3{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;}
.why-card p{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;}

/* ACADEMICS */
#academics{background:var(--white);}
.ac-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.1fr;gap:72px;align-items:start;}
.ac-intro .sec-p{margin-bottom:28px;}
.mi-theory{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--teal-l),#e0f2fe);border-radius:var(--r);padding:28px;border:1px solid var(--teal-mid);margin-bottom:24px;}
.mi-theory h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal-d);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;}
.mi-theory p{font-size:.87rem;color:var(--text);line-height:1.7;}
.mi-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;}
.mi-tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--teal-d);font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid var(--teal-mid);}
.ac-cards-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}
.ac-card{background:var(--off);border-radius:var(--r);padding:22px 20px;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .2s;}
.ac-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow);border-color:var(--teal-mid);}
.ac-card-icon{font-size:1.8rem;display:block;margin-bottom:10px;}
.ac-card h4{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:6px;}
.ac-card p{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}

/* FACILITIES */
#facilities{background:var(--navy);padding:88px 24px;}
.fac-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:48px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;}
.fac-top .sec-h{color:var(--white);margin-bottom:0;}
.fac-top .sec-p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin-bottom:0;max-width:380px;}
.fac-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:18px;}
.fac-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:var(--r);padding:30px 22px;transition:all .25s;}
.fac-card:hover{background:rgba(8,145,178,.15);border-color:rgba(8,145,178,.4);transform:translateY(-5px);}
.fac-icon{font-size:2.6rem;display:block;margin-bottom:14px;}
.fac-card h3{font-size:.93rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:7px;}
.fac-card p{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);line-height:1.65;}

/* ADMISSIONS */
#admissions{background:var(--off);}
.adm-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.05fr;gap:72px;align-items:start;}
.steps{margin-bottom:32px;}
.step-row{display:flex;gap:16px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.step-track{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0;}
.step-dot{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--teal);color:var(--white);font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(8,145,178,.3);}
.step-line-v{flex:1;width:2px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 0;min-height:24px;}
.step-content{padding-bottom:20px;}
.step-content h4{font-size:.93rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:4px;}
.step-content p{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
.info-box{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--r);padding:24px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.info-box h4{font-size:.87rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.info-list{list-style:none;}
.info-list li{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.info-list li:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.info-list li::before{content:'→';color:var(--teal);font-weight:700;}
.form-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:20px;padding:40px 36px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);border:1px solid var(--border);}
.form-card-head{margin-bottom:24px;}
.form-card-head h3{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.7rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;}
.form-card-head p{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--muted);}
.frow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;}
.fgrp{margin-bottom:14px;}
.fgrp label{display:block;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:700;color:#374151;margin-bottom:5px;letter-spacing:.3px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.fgrp input,.fgrp select,.fgrp textarea{width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;background:var(--off);}
.fgrp input:focus,.fgrp select:focus,.fgrp textarea:focus{border-color:var(--teal);background:var(--white);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(8,145,178,.08);}
.fgrp textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:80px;}
.form-submit{width:100%;padding:14px;background:var(--teal);color:var(--white);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.97rem;border:none;border-radius:50px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(8,145,178,.3);margin-top:6px;}
.form-submit:hover{background:var(--teal-d);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(8,145,178,.38);}

/* GALLERY */
#gallery{background:var(--white);}
.gal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:14px;}
.gal-item{border-radius:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:190px;font-size:3rem;transition:all .25s;cursor:pointer;padding:24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.gal-item:hover{transform:scale(1.02);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
.gal-item.gi1{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fde8ea,#fecaca);grid-column:span 2;min-height:240px;}
.gal-item.gi2{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--teal-l),#a5f3fc);}
.gal-item.gi3{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--sage-l),#bbf7d0);}
.gal-item.gi4{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--amber-l),#fde68a);}
.gal-item.gi5{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f3e8ff,#e9d5ff);grid-column:span 2;min-height:240px;}
.gl-label{font-size:.83rem;color:rgba(0,0,0,.45);margin-top:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.3px;}

/* CONTACT */
#contact{background:var(--navy);padding:88px 24px;}
.con-inner{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:72px;align-items:start;}
.con-left h2{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,2.6rem);color:var(--white);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;}
.con-left>p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:40px;}
.con-detail{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px;margin-bottom:20px;}
.con-ico{width:44px;height:44px;background:rgba(8,145,178,.18);border:1px solid rgba(8,145,178,.3);border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.con-txt strong{display:block;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:rgba(8,145,178,.9);margin-bottom:3px;}
.con-txt span,.con-txt a{font-size:.9rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none;line-height:1.5;display:block;}
.con-txt a:hover{color:var(--teal-mid);}
.wa-cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:#25d366;color:var(--white);padding:13px 26px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;text-decoration:none;margin-top:28px;transition:all .2s;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(37,211,102,.3);}
.wa-cta:hover{background:#1ebe5b;transform:translateY(-2px);}
.con-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:20px;padding:36px 32px;box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.2);}
.con-card h3{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;}
.con-card>p{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:22px;}
.map-area{background:var(--teal-l);border-radius:12px;height:175px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-top:18px;border:1px solid var(--teal-mid);text-align:center;padding:20px;}
.map-area .mi{font-size:2.2rem;}
.map-area p{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--teal-d);font-weight:600;line-height:1.5;}
.map-area a{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal-d);text-decoration:none;background:var(--white);padding:7px 18px;border-radius:20px;border:1.5px solid var(--teal);transition:all .2s;}
.map-area a:hover{background:var(--teal);color:var(--white);}

/* FOOTER */
footer{background:#060d1f;padding:48px 24px 24px;}
.footer-inner{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;}
.footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr 1fr;gap:48px;margin-bottom:40px;}
.footer-brand img{height:50px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.footer-brand p{font-size:.83rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);line-height:1.75;}
.footer-col h5{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;}
.footer-col ul{list-style:none;}
.footer-col li{margin-bottom:10px;}
.footer-col a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-decoration:none;font-size:.83rem;transition:color .2s;}
.footer-col a:hover{color:var(--teal-mid);}
.footer-bar{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);padding-top:20px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;}
.footer-bar p{font-size:.77rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);}

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media(max-width:960px){
  .hero-wrap,.two-col,.ac-layout,.adm-layout,.con-inner,.footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .hero-visual{display:none;}
  .why-grid,.three-col{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .four-col{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .research-box{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .frow{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}
@media(max-width:600px){
  .why-grid,.three-col,.four-col{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .gal-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .gi1,.gi5{grid-column:span 1;min-height:160px;}
  .stats-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .sec{padding:60px 18px;}
  #facilities,#contact{padding:60px 18px;}
  .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- TOP BAR -->
<div class="topbar">
  <div class="topbar-left">
    <span>📍 B-86, Sector-C, Mahanagar, Lucknow – 226006</span>
    <a href="tel:+917565887777">📞 +91 75658 87777</a>
    <span>🕐 Mon–Sat &nbsp;8:00 AM – 1:00 PM</span>
  </div>
  <div class="topbar-right">
    <a href="https://wa.me/917565887777" target="_blank" class="topbar-wa">💬 WhatsApp</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <div class="nav-logo"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Banbury Cross Educational Academy"/></div>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="#why-early">Why Preschool</a></li>
      <li><a href="#why-us">Why Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="#academics">Academics</a></li>
      <li><a href="#facilities">Facilities</a></li>
      <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
      <li><a href="#admissions" class="nav-apply">Apply Now</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-wrap">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">Lucknow's Premier Early Childhood Academy</div>
      <h1>Nurturing Every Child's<br/><i>Unique Brilliance</i></h1>
      <p class="hero-desc">At Banbury Cross Educational Academy, we believe that the first five years of a child's life are the most formative. Rooted in the Theory of Multiple Intelligences, we provide a joyful, research-backed learning environment that celebrates every child's individual strengths.</p>
      <div class="hero-ctas">
        <a href="#admissions" class="btn btn-teal">Schedule a Visit</a>
        <a href="#why-us" class="btn btn-ghost">Why Banbury Cross?</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-trust">
        <div class="trust-item"><strong>30+</strong>&nbsp;Years of Excellence</div>
        <div class="trust-item">•</div>
        <div class="trust-item"><strong>Est. 1990</strong></div>
        <div class="trust-item">•</div>
        <div class="trust-item">Playgroup · Nursery · LKG · UKG</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-visual">
      <div class="hero-main-card">
        <span class="hero-main-icon">👩‍🏫</span>
        <h3>Where Every Child Shines</h3>
        <p>"Creating Great Minds for a Great Future"</p>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-sub-cards">
        <div class="hero-sub-card"><span class="hsc-icon">🧠</span><div class="hsc-text"><strong>Multiple Intelligence</strong><span>8 learning pathways</span></div></div>
        <div class="hero-sub-card"><span class="hsc-icon">🎠</span><div class="hsc-text"><strong>Soft Play</strong><span>Safe &amp; stimulating</span></div></div>
        <div class="hero-sub-card"><span class="hsc-icon">🖥️</span><div class="hsc-text"><strong>Smart Classes</strong><span>Tech-enabled learning</span></div></div>
        <div class="hero-sub-card"><span class="hsc-icon">🌳</span><div class="hsc-text"><strong>Outdoor Play</strong><span>Fresh air &amp; activity</span></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS STRIP -->
<div class="stats-strip">
  <div class="stats-inner">
    <div class="stat"><span class="stat-n">30+</span><span class="stat-l">Years of Trust in Lucknow</span></div>
    <div class="stat"><span class="stat-n">8</span><span class="stat-l">Multiple Intelligence Pathways</span></div>
    <div class="stat"><span class="stat-n">4</span><span class="stat-l">Programmes: Playgroup to UKG</span></div>
    <div class="stat"><span class="stat-n">5★</span><span class="stat-l">Parent-Rated Experience</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WHY EARLY EDUCATION -->
<section id="why-early" class="sec">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <span class="eyebrow ey-teal">The Science of Early Learning</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h">Why Preschool Is the Most<br/>Important Investment You Can Make</h2>
    <p class="sec-p">Decades of research in developmental psychology consistently show that the years from birth to age six are the most critical window for brain development, emotional resilience, and lifelong learning habits.</p>
    <div class="four-col">
      <div class="early-card">
        <span class="ec-icon">🧠</span>
        <h3>90% Brain Development by Age 5</h3>
        <p>Neuroscience confirms that the brain forms over 90% of its neural connections before a child turns five — making early stimulation absolutely vital.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="early-card">
        <span class="ec-icon">🗣️</span>
        <h3>Language Acquisition Window</h3>
        <p>Ages 2–6 represent the peak window for language development. Children in structured early education environments develop vocabulary three times faster.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="early-card">
        <span class="ec-icon">🤝</span>
        <h3>Social & Emotional Skills</h3>
        <p>Early group learning environments build empathy, patience, and social confidence — skills that predict academic success and happiness far more than IQ alone.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="early-card">
        <span class="ec-icon">📈</span>
        <h3>Long-Term Academic Advantage</h3>
        <p>Studies from Harvard and UNESCO show that children who attend quality preschools are significantly more likely to graduate, earn more, and lead healthier lives.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="research-box">
      <div class="rb-text">
        <h3>What Research Tells Us About Early Childhood Education</h3>
        <p>The Perry Preschool Project and similar long-term studies have tracked children over decades and found consistent, significant advantages for those who received quality early education — in literacy, numeracy, social adjustment, and even health outcomes.</p>
        <p style="margin-top:12px;">This is why choosing the right preschool isn't just about where your child spends their mornings — it is one of the most consequential decisions a parent can make.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="rb-stats">
        <div class="rb-stat"><span class="rb-stat-n">2×</span><span class="rb-stat-l">More likely to complete higher education</span></div>
        <div class="rb-stat"><span class="rb-stat-n">40%</span><span class="rb-stat-l">Stronger vocabulary by age 7</span></div>
        <div class="rb-stat"><span class="rb-stat-n">85%</span><span class="rb-stat-l">Improvement in social confidence</span></div>
        <div class="rb-stat"><span class="rb-stat-n">3×</span><span class="rb-stat-l">Better emotional regulation skills</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about" class="sec" style="background:var(--off);">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="two-col">
      <div class="about-img">
        <span class="about-img-icon">🌟</span>
        <h3>A Home Away From Home</h3>
        <p>Safe, warm, and full of wonder — every single day at Banbury Cross.</p>
        <div class="since-pill">Established 1990</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="eyebrow ey-amber">About the School</span>
        <h2 class="sec-h">Banbury Cross Educational Academy</h2>
        <p class="sec-p" style="margin-bottom:0;">One of Mahanagar, Lucknow's most respected institutions for early childhood education and personality development since 1990. We don't just teach — we shape futures.</p>
        <ul class="about-list">
          <li><div class="al-dot">✓</div>Over three decades of trusted early childhood education in the heart of Lucknow.</li>
          <li><div class="al-dot">✓</div>Built around Howard Gardner's globally recognised <strong>Theory of Multiple Intelligences</strong> — honouring each child's unique gifts.</li>
          <li><div class="al-dot">✓</div>Expert, caring faculty trained in child psychology and personalised, activity-based pedagogy.</li>
          <li><div class="al-dot">✓</div>A structured yet joyful environment that balances academics, creativity, and physical development seamlessly.</li>
          <li><div class="al-dot">✓</div>Strong focus on <strong>personality development</strong> — building confidence, communication, and character from day one.</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="mini-stats">
          <div class="ms"><span class="ms-n">30+</span><span class="ms-l">Years of Trust</span></div>
          <div class="ms"><span class="ms-n">8</span><span class="ms-l">Intelligence Types</span></div>
          <div class="ms"><span class="ms-n">100%</span><span class="ms-l">Dedicated Faculty</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHY CHOOSE US -->
<section id="why-us" class="sec">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <span class="eyebrow ey-red">Why Choose Banbury Cross</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h">What Sets Us Apart</h2>
    <p class="sec-p">There are many preschools in Lucknow. Here is why hundreds of families over three decades have chosen — and continue to choose — Banbury Cross.</p>
    <div class="why-grid">
      <div class="why-card">
        <span class="wc-num">01</span>
        <span class="wc-icon">🧠</span>
        <h3>Multiple Intelligence Curriculum</h3>
        <p>We are among the very few schools in Lucknow that genuinely implement Howard Gardner's MI Theory — ensuring your child's learning style is truly catered to, not just ticked off a checklist.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="why-card">
        <span class="wc-num">02</span>
        <span class="wc-icon">🏅</span>
        <h3>30+ Years of Proven Results</h3>
        <p>Since 1990, Banbury Cross alumni have gone on to excel across academics, arts, sports, and professional life — a track record that speaks for itself across generations of Lucknow families.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="why-card">
        <span class="wc-num">03</span>
        <span class="wc-icon">🎭</span>
        <h3>Personality-First Development</h3>
        <p>We recognise that a child's personality, confidence, and character matter as much as academic scores. Our programme is uniquely designed around holistic personality development.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="why-card">
        <span class="wc-num">04</span>
        <span class="wc-icon">🌱</span>
        <h3>Nurturing, Low-Stress Environment</h3>
        <p>Research shows that children learn best when they feel safe and valued. Our classrooms are warm, stress-free spaces designed around the emotional wellbeing of every child.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="why-card">
        <span class="wc-num">05</span>
        <span class="wc-icon">🖥️</span>
        <h3>Modern Facilities, Timeless Values</h3>
        <p>From smart classrooms and a soft play area to an outdoor stage and amphitheatre — our campus blends cutting-edge infrastructure with the timeless values of care and integrity.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="why-card">
        <span class="wc-num">06</span>
        <span class="wc-icon">👨‍👩‍👧</span>
        <h3>A True Partnership with Parents</h3>
        <p>We believe parents are co-educators. Our open-door policy, regular parent interactions, and transparent communication ensure you are always part of your child's learning journey.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ACADEMICS -->
<section id="academics" class="sec" style="background:var(--off);">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="ac-layout">
      <div class="ac-intro">
        <span class="eyebrow ey-teal">Our Curriculum</span>
        <h2 class="sec-h">A Framework Built for Every Child</h2>
        <p class="sec-p">Our curriculum is not one-size-fits-all. It is carefully designed around the understanding that children learn differently — and that each difference is a strength, not a limitation.</p>
        <div class="mi-theory">
          <h4>The Theory of Multiple Intelligences</h4>
          <p>Developed by Harvard psychologist Dr. Howard Gardner, the Theory of Multiple Intelligences proposes that human intelligence is not a single capacity but a collection of distinct abilities. At Banbury Cross, our teachers are trained to identify and nurture each of these intelligences in every child.</p>
          <div class="mi-tags">
            <span class="mi-tag">🎵 Musical</span>
            <span class="mi-tag">🖼️ Visual-Spatial</span>
            <span class="mi-tag">🏃 Bodily-Kinaesthetic</span>
            <span class="mi-tag">📖 Linguistic</span>
            <span class="mi-tag">🔢 Logical-Mathematical</span>
            <span class="mi-tag">🤝 Interpersonal</span>
            <span class="mi-tag">🪞 Intrapersonal</span>
            <span class="mi-tag">🌿 Naturalist</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <a href="#admissions" class="btn btn-teal">Enquire About Our Curriculum</a>
      </div>
      <div class="ac-cards-grid">
        <div class="ac-card"><span class="ac-card-icon">🎵</span><h4>Music &amp; Rhythm</h4><p>Songs, instruments, and rhythm exercises that build memory, pattern recognition, and emotional expression.</p></div>
        <div class="ac-card"><span class="ac-card-icon">🖼️</span><h4>Visual Arts</h4><p>Drawing, painting, and craft activities that develop spatial awareness, creativity, and fine motor skills.</p></div>
        <div class="ac-card"><span class="ac-card-icon">🏃</span><h4>Movement &amp; Play</h4><p>Structured physical activities and free play that build coordination, body awareness, and gross motor development.</p></div>
        <div class="ac-card"><span class="ac-card-icon">📖</span><h4>Language &amp; Stories</h4><p>Storytelling, rhymes, and early reading that build vocabulary, comprehension, and a love for language.</p></div>
        <div class="ac-card"><span class="ac-card-icon">🔢</span><h4>Numbers &amp; Logic</h4><p>Play-based mathematical concepts that develop logical thinking, sequencing, and early numeracy foundations.</p></div>
        <div class="ac-card"><span class="ac-card-icon">🤝</span><h4>Social &amp; Emotional</h4><p>Group activities, role play, and guided conversations that build empathy, sharing, and communication skills.</p></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FACILITIES -->
<section id="facilities">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="fac-top">
      <div>
        <span class="eyebrow ey-teal">Our Campus</span>
        <h2 class="sec-h">Built for Curious Minds</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="sec-p">Every inch of our campus is thoughtfully designed to inspire exploration, encourage active play, and make learning an adventure your child looks forward to every morning.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="fac-grid">
      <div class="fac-card"><span class="fac-icon">🎠</span><h3>Soft Play Area</h3><p>A cushioned, colourful indoor play zone where toddlers safely explore, tumble, and build foundational motor skills.</p></div>
      <div class="fac-card"><span class="fac-icon">🖥️</span><h3>Smart Classrooms</h3><p>Interactive boards and audio-visual learning tools that make every lesson engaging, immersive, and technology-forward.</p></div>
      <div class="fac-card"><span class="fac-icon">🌳</span><h3>Outdoor Play Area</h3><p>Spacious, shaded grounds with swings, slides, and open space for fresh air, physical activity, and social play.</p></div>
      <div class="fac-card"><span class="fac-icon">🎭</span><h3>Amphitheatre</h3><p>A dedicated performance stage for cultural events, annual days, and skits — building confidence and self-expression from an early age.</p></div>
      <div class="fac-card"><span class="fac-icon">🧩</span><h3>Activity Rooms</h3><p>Purpose-designed spaces for arts, crafts, music, and group projects that spark teamwork, imagination, and creative thinking.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ADMISSIONS -->
<section id="admissions" class="sec">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="adm-layout">
      <div>
        <span class="eyebrow ey-teal">Admissions 2025–26</span>
        <h2 class="sec-h">Join the Banbury Cross Family</h2>
        <p class="sec-p">Our admissions process is simple, warm, and designed entirely around getting to know your child. We admit children based on a friendly interaction — no stressful entrance tests.</p>
        <div class="steps">
          <div class="step-row">
            <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot">1</div><div class="step-line-v"></div></div>
            <div class="step-content"><h4>Enquire &amp; Book a Visit</h4><p>Reach out via phone, WhatsApp, or the form. Schedule a campus tour at a time convenient for you.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div class="step-row">
            <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot">2</div><div class="step-line-v"></div></div>
            <div class="step-content"><h4>Campus Tour &amp; Interaction</h4><p>Visit the school, meet the faculty, and see our facilities. A brief, relaxed interaction helps us understand your child's personality.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div class="step-row">
            <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot">3</div><div class="step-line-v"></div></div>
            <div class="step-content"><h4>Submit Registration</h4><p>Complete the simple registration form along with the required documents. Our team will guide you through every step.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div class="step-row">
            <div class="step-track"><div class="step-dot">4</div></div>
            <div class="step-content"><h4>Welcome to Banbury Cross</h4><p>Complete enrolment formalities and prepare your child for a joyful, transformative new chapter in their life.</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-box">
          <h4>📋 Documents Required</h4>
          <ul class="info-list">
            <li>Child's birth certificate</li>
            <li>Recent passport-size photographs</li>
            <li>Parent / guardian photo ID</li>
            <li>Address proof</li>
            <li>Previous school records (if applicable)</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="form-card-head">
          <h3>Schedule a Visit</h3>
          <p>Fill in the details below and our team will respond on WhatsApp within 2 hours.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="frow">
          <div class="fgrp"><label>Parent / Guardian Name *</label><input id="enq-parent" type="text" placeholder="Your full name"/></div>
          <div class="fgrp"><label>Child's Name *</label><input id="enq-child" type="text" placeholder="Child's name"/></div>
        </div>
        <div class="frow">
          <div class="fgrp"><label>Phone Number *</label><input id="enq-phone" type="tel" placeholder="+91 XXXXX XXXXX"/></div>
          <div class="fgrp"><label>Email Address</label><input id="enq-email" type="email" placeholder="your@email.com"/></div>
        </div>
        <div class="fgrp">
          <label>Applying For</label>
          <select id="enq-programme">
            <option value="">Select programme</option>
            <option>Playgroup (1.5 – 2.5 yrs)</option>
            <option>Nursery (2.5 – 3.5 yrs)</option>
            <option>LKG (3.5 – 4.5 yrs)</option>
            <option>UKG (4.5 – 5.5 yrs)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="fgrp"><label>Message (Optional)</label><textarea id="enq-msg" placeholder="Any questions or requirements..."></textarea></div>
        <button class="form-submit" onclick="sendEnquiry()">📲 Send Enquiry via WhatsApp</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<section id="gallery" class="sec" style="background:var(--off);">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <span class="eyebrow ey-amber">Life at Banbury Cross</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h">A Glimpse of Our World</h2>
    <p class="sec-p">Every day at Banbury Cross is a new adventure — filled with creativity, discovery, laughter, and the sheer joy of learning.</p>
    <div class="gal-grid">
      <div class="gal-item gi1">🎨<span class="gl-label">Arts &amp; Craft</span></div>
      <div class="gal-item gi2">🎵<span class="gl-label">Music &amp; Movement</span></div>
      <div class="gal-item gi3">🌿<span class="gl-label">Outdoor Play</span></div>
      <div class="gal-item gi4">📚<span class="gl-label">Story Time</span></div>
      <div class="gal-item gi5">🎭<span class="gl-label">Annual Day Performances</span></div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:32px;">
      <a href="#admissions" class="btn btn-teal">Book a Campus Visit</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="con-inner">
    <div class="con-left">
      <h2>Come and See for Yourself</h2>
      <p>The best way to understand what makes Banbury Cross special is to experience it in person. We warmly welcome you to visit our campus, meet our teachers, and see your child's future home of learning.</p>
      <div class="con-detail">
        <div class="con-ico">📍</div>
        <div class="con-txt"><strong>Address</strong><span>B-86, Sector-C, Mahanagar,<br/>Lucknow – 226006, Uttar Pradesh</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="con-detail">
        <div class="con-ico">📞</div>
        <div class="con-txt"><strong>Phone</strong><a href="tel:+917565887777">+91 75658 87777</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="con-detail">
        <div class="con-ico">🕐</div>
        <div class="con-txt"><strong>School Hours</strong><span>Monday – Saturday &nbsp;|&nbsp; 8:00 AM – 1:00 PM</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="con-detail">
        <div class="con-ico">🎓</div>
        <div class="con-txt"><strong>Programmes Offered</strong><span>Playgroup · Nursery · LKG · UKG</span></div>
      </div>
      <a href="https://wa.me/917565887777?text=Hello%2C%20I%20would%20like%20to%20enquire%20about%20admissions%20at%20Banbury%20Cross%20Educational%20Academy." target="_blank" class="wa-cta">💬 Chat on WhatsApp</a>
    </div>
    <div class="con-card">
      <h3>Send Us a Message</h3>
      <p>We aim to respond within 2 hours on WhatsApp.</p>
      <div class="fgrp"><label>Your Name *</label><input id="ct-name" type="text" placeholder="Full name"/></div>
      <div class="fgrp"><label>Phone Number *</label><input id="ct-phone" type="tel" placeholder="+91 XXXXX XXXXX"/></div>
      <div class="fgrp"><label>Message</label><textarea id="ct-msg" placeholder="How can we help you?"></textarea></div>
      <button class="form-submit" onclick="sendContact()">Send via WhatsApp 💬</button>
      <div class="map-area">
        <span class="mi">🗺️</span>
        <p>B-86, Sector-C, Mahanagar,<br/>Lucknow – 226006</p>
        <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=B-86+Sector+C+Mahanagar+Lucknow+226006" target="_blank">Open in Google Maps →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-grid">
      <div class="footer-brand">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Banbury Cross"/>
        <p>"Creating Great Minds for a Great Future." Banbury Cross Educational Academy has been shaping the minds and personalities of Lucknow's youngest learners since 1990, through an enriching, research-backed approach to early childhood education.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-col">
        <h5>Quick Links</h5>
        <ul>
          <li><a href="#about">About Us</a></li>
          <li><a href="#why-early">Why Preschool?</a></li>
          <li><a href="#why-us">Why Choose Us</a></li>
          <li><a href="#academics">Academics</a></li>
          <li><a href="#facilities">Facilities</a></li>
          <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
          <li><a href="#admissions">Admissions</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-col">
        <h5>Contact</h5>
        <ul>
          <li><a href="tel:+917565887777">📞 +91 75658 87777</a></li>
          <li><a href="https://wa.me/917565887777" target="_blank">💬 WhatsApp Us</a></li>
          <li><a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=B-86+Sector+C+Mahanagar+Lucknow" target="_blank">📍 B-86, Sector-C, Mahanagar</a></li>
          <li><a>🕐 Mon–Sat, 8 AM – 1 PM</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bar">
      <p>© 2025 Banbury Cross Educational Academy, Lucknow. All rights reserved.</p>
      <p>B-86, Sector-C, Mahanagar, Lucknow – 226006, Uttar Pradesh</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(function(a){
  a.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    var id=this.getAttribute('href').slice(1);
    var el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(el){e.preventDefault();var nav=document.querySelector('nav');var top=el.getBoundingClientRect().top+window.pageYOffset-(nav.offsetHeight+12);window.scrollTo({top:top,behavior:'smooth'});}
  });
});

const WA='917565887777';
function sendEnquiry(){
  var p=document.getElementById('enq-parent').value.trim();
  var c=document.getElementById('enq-child').value.trim();
  var ph=document.getElementById('enq-phone').value.trim();
  var em=document.getElementById('enq-email').value.trim();
  var pr=document.getElementById('enq-programme').value.trim();
  var ms=document.getElementById('enq-msg').value.trim();
  if(!p||!c||!ph){alert('Please fill in Parent Name, Child Name, and Phone Number.');return;}
  var t='*📋 Admission Enquiry – Banbury Cross Educational Academy*\n\n'
    +'👤 *Parent:* '+p+'\n'+'👶 *Child:* '+c+'\n'+'📞 *Phone:* '+ph+'\n'
    +(em?'📧 *Email:* '+em+'\n':'')+(pr?'🎒 *Programme:* '+pr+'\n':'')+(ms?'💬 *Message:* '+ms+'\n':'')
    +'\n_Sent from the Banbury Cross website_';
  window.open('https://wa.me/'+WA+'?text='+encodeURIComponent(t),'_blank');
}
function sendContact(){
  var n=document.getElementById('ct-name').value.trim();
  var ph=document.getElementById('ct-phone').value.trim();
  var ms=document.getElementById('ct-msg').value.trim();
  if(!n||!ph){alert('Please fill in your Name and Phone Number.');return;}
  var t='*💬 Website Contact – Banbury Cross*\n\n'
    +'👤 *Name:* '+n+'\n'+'📞 *Phone:* '+ph+'\n'+(ms?'💬 *Message:* '+ms+'\n':'')
    +'\n_Sent from the Banbury Cross website_';
  window.open('https://wa.me/'+WA+'?text='+encodeURIComponent(t),'_blank');
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
